acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects node_notes[] entries whose node_id is blank or does not match a node in roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The new node note node-id validator trims node_id values, rejects blank values, and indexes roadmap nodes before accepting references. The unknown-node temporary-copy smoke records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects unknown node_notes[].kind values outside blocker and retry.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The validator uses the existing validate_roadmap_record_values helper for node_notes[].kind with the blocker/retry vocabulary. The unknown-kind smoke records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects blank node_notes[].id or node_notes[].text values.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The required-string helper trims id and text fields and rejects non-string or blank values. The blank-note-content smoke records whitespace-only text failing.
The duplicate-id validator groups trimmed note ids and reports repeated ids after the first instance. The duplicate-id smoke records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-node-note-schema-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log records the stricter checker passing against the current export and reports.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Required evidence logs and qd reports are present.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The completion report lists the direct qd report check, full Nix check, git diff check, and all four negative smoke logs; this audit report verifies those paths exist and are scoped to this node.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; Linux command evidence is recorded and no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
